source: Yahoo Finance chart API futures + AkShare/Sina domestic main continuous

calendar_spread.name: 境内原油近月-次近月月差套利
calendar_spread.factor_logic: Fade extreme SC calendar spread only when near/far open-interest ratio reverses.

eia_wti_spread.name: 美国EIA库存因子 WTI 月差套利
eia_wti_spread.source: Yahoo WTI contracts + EIA API WCESTUS1

risk_sentiment_overlay.method: walk-forward ridge regression on next-day WTI spread return
risk_sentiment_overlay.note: GPR is displayed as a monitor but excluded from the current ridge model after feature screening.

historical_spread_backtest.name: SC历史相邻月月差泛化测试
historical_spread_backtest.source: AkShare/Sina SC expired and active contract daily data
historical_spread_backtest.strategy: 60D spread z-score reversal confirmed by 10D near/far open-interest ratio reversal
historical_spread_backtest.fee_note: SC costs are deducted on position changes: 0.04 CNY/unit/leg, 40 CNY/lot/leg.
